prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约4816→4527→4113→4499→4675名，整体呈先升后降再回升的波动走势；2025年基准约4675名，较2024年小幅后移约176名，近两 年位次在4500–4700区间震荡；该校在江苏物理类招生计划2021年100人、2022年101人、2023年97人、2024年100人、2025年90人；2026年计划92人，较20 25年小幅扩招2人，扩幅约2.2%，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第33名，近年稳定在28–33名区间，属 国内顶尖理工类院校；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，涉及2起学校管理/师德事件，可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度总排名第33（较热），短 视频曝光量处于中上水平，整体关注度较高但非顶流；电子科学与技术A+、信息与通信工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、仪器科学与技术A-、光学工程A-、管理科 学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，电子信息与计算机领域实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类社会热度高热推荐，计算机类推荐 ，电气工程高热推荐，均为该校核心招生方向；江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约52.1万，物理类按近年占比约72.9%估算约38万人，较2025年物理类26.1万人增长约45.7%，考生规 模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；电子科技大学位于四川成都，属西部985，在江苏属跨省招生；2025年物理类计划90人占该 校在江苏总计划约93.8%，属主力招生科类；地域偏好上，江苏考生对西部高校存在一定距离考量，但该校作为电子信息领域顶尖院校，跨省吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 历年位次在4500–4700区间震荡、2026年招生计划小幅扩招2人、江苏省物理类考生规模大幅增长约45.7%导致竞争加剧、声誉偏负面轻微抑制热度等因素，在2025年基准4675名基 础上预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约4767名，区间4267–5267名。

- 集成电路设计与集成系统（国家示范性微电子学院）
- 电子信息类（信息与通信）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4267–5267名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（计算机类、电子信息类、微电子等），一档英才/实验班可冲刺，三档软件工程/数学类作为保底；位次明显优于区 间下限（<4267名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4816 → 4527 → 4113 → 4499 → 4675, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again; the 2025 baseline is about 4675, a slight drop of about 176 places compared to 2024, with rankings oscillating in the 4500–4700 range in recent two years; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu was 100 in 2021, 101 in 2022, 97 in 2023, 100 in 2024, and 90 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 92, a slight increase of 2 students from 2025, an expansion of about 2.2%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, stable in the 28–33 range in recent years, belonging to top domestic science and engineering institutions; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving 2 incidents of school management/teacher ethics, which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin heat ranking is 33rd (relatively hot), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, overall attention is high but not top-tier; Electronic Science and Technology A+, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A-, Optical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding strength in electronics and computer fields, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronics/Communication majors are highly recommended with high social heat, Computer majors are recommended, Electrical Engineering is highly recommended, all core recruitment directions of the university; the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is about 521,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 380,000 based on the recent proportion of about 72.9%, an increase of about 45.7% from the 261,000 Physics Category candidates in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, a western 985 university, recruiting across provinces in Jiangsu; the 2025 Physics Category plan of 90 students accounts for about 93.8% of the total plan in Jiangsu, making it the main recruitment category; in terms of regional preference, Jiangsu candidates have some distance considerations for western universities, but as a top university in the electronics field, its cross-provincial appeal is strong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical rankings oscillating in the 4500–4700 range, a slight expansion of 2 students in the 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 45.7% in the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province leading to intensified competition, and a slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing enthusiasm, based on the 2025 baseline of 4675, the ranking is expected to drop slightly; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4767, with a range of 4267–5267.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Economics and Management Pilot Class (Management and Electronics Dual Degree Training)
- Software Engineering (Shahe Campus) (Various Directions)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4267–5267, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Microelectronics, etc.), with Tier 1 elite/experimental classes as a reach, and Tier 3 Software Engineering/Mathematics as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4267), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2329 → 2031 → 2510, with significant fluctuations; the 2025 baseline is about 2510, a notable backward shift of about 479 places compared to 2024; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu was 4 students in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 6 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 6 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, a top domestic science and engineering institution, but its liberal arts programs are not traditionally strong; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving 2 incidents of school management/teacher ethics, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranks 33rd overall (relatively hot), with overall attention at a medium-high level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign Language and Literature categories have generally lukewarm social popularity; Social Science Experimental Class (including Law and Public Administration) has divided popularity for Law; in 2026, Jiangsu's History Category is estimated at about 141,000 students based on the recent proportion of about 27.1%, a significant increase of about 45.4% compared to 97,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, a western 985 university, and recruits across provinces in Jiangsu; only 3 majors with a total of 6 students are offered in History Category, a very small enrollment scale, making rankings susceptible to fluctuations due to the application decisions of a few high-scoring students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as significant historical ranking fluctuations, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a substantial 45.4% increase in History Category candidates leading to intensified competition, and a somewhat negative reputation, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 2510; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2535, with a range of 2155–2915.
